title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (Node.js, AWS, AI)

summary.lv: IT Camp partneris (fintech) meklē Senior Full-Stack inženieri ar Node.js, AWS un AI pieredzi, kas izstrādās maksājumu karšu izlaišanas un digitālo kontu pārvaldības platformas.
summary.en: An IT Camp partner (fintech) is hiring a Senior Full-Stack Engineer with Node.js, AWS and AI experience to build payment-card issuance and digital account management infrastructure.
